brand_identity.name: VEIL
brand_identity.concept: A veil that unveils - mystery being revealed thoughtfully
brand_identity.vibe: Cozy, safe, intimate, premium, warm, trustworthy, LGBT-friendly
brand_identity.anti_patterns: No harsh neon, no generic purple gradients on white, no center-everything disease, no standard hookup-app grid feeling

archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) infused with Warm Intimacy

Onboarding.layout: Full screen background image (veil texture) with linear gradient overlay (transparent to #0B0811). Bottom-heavy content: Logo, 'A veil that unveils', age verification checkbox, and Primary enter button.

Grid_Feed.layout: Sticky glassmorphic header with logo and 'Premium' toggle. 2-column masonry or flex-wrap grid. User cards use 3:4 aspect ratio. Names and distance overlay at the bottom of the card using a smooth gradient (#000000 at 0% to transparent). Generous 12px gaps.

User_Profile.layout: Immersive image taking top 60% of screen. Content overlays starting at 50% height with a glassmorphic sheet (borderTopLeftRadius: 32, borderTopRightRadius: 32). Basic info: Name, Age, Bio. Horizontal scroll for 'Common Interests' tags. Fixed bottom container with 'Free Chat' and 'TAP' primary action buttons.

Chat.layout: Header with user mini-avatar and name. Scrollable message list. Message input at bottom with blurred background. 'Blue Arrows' read receipt indicator embedded inside or below sender bubbles for Premium users only.

TAP_Zone.layout: Horizontal carousel of nearby users. Large circular avatars. Below avatar, a row of quick non-verbal interaction badges (Wave, Flame, Drink) that scale up on tap.

Premium_Screens.layout: Focus on the Violet Diamond logo with subtle gold (#D4AF37) glowing outlines. Lists premium features: Read Receipts (Blue Arrows), Advanced Filters, See Who Tapped You. CTA uses a shimmering animation.

motion.screen_transitions: Fade-through-black or smooth blur reveals (unveiling effect). Avoid harsh slides.
motion.micro_interactions: Spring animations on buttons and tap badges (scale down to 0.95 on press). Haptic feedback on all interactions.
motion.veil_effect: When revealing a photo or opening a premium feature, use an opacity + blur transition to mimic lifting a veil.

accessibility.contrast: Maintain WCAG AA on all text. Text over images MUST have a gradient overlay under it.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion in React Native Reanimated settings.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48px for all interactable elements (buttons, tags, back icons).

image_urls.description: Abstract dark purple silk texture - use for Onboarding background and Veil branding elements.
Glowing violet diamond on dark background - use as inspiration for the app icon and premium screen graphics.
Handsome man portrait moody lighting - use as a placeholder for user profile examples.
Handsome man looking away - use as a placeholder for user grid examples.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind. Adapt styling tokens to RN (e.g. paddingHorizontal instead of px).
Ensure all images have dark linear gradients applied over them before placing text on top.
Utilize Expo Blur (expo-blur) heavily for glassmorphism to implement the 'veil' aesthetic.
Do NOT use pure #000000. Use the provided #0B0811 base.
Implement the 'TAP zone' as a playful, haptic-heavy interaction area.
Keep chat free but restrict the display of 'premium_blue_arrows' to premium tier logic.
Add 'data-testid' equivalent (testID in React Native) to all interactive elements for robust testing.
